message:
fix(provider): generalize reasoning block tracking with ReasoningKind enum for summary and text variants

Refactor the OpenAI Responses stream builder's reasoning block tracking
to support both summary-style and text-style reasoning events through
a unified ReasoningKind enum:

- Replace ReasoningKey { item_id, summary_index } with
  ReasoningKey { item_id, kind: ReasoningKind, index } where
  ReasoningKind is Summary or Text
- Update reasoning_block_for() to accept kind parameter
- Extract append_reasoning_delta() helper method that handles the
  common pattern of looking up or creating a reasoning block and
  appending delta text
- Update apply_reasoning_snapshot() to pass ReasoningKind through
- This enables correct handling of both
  response.reasoning_summary_part.{delta,done} and
  response.reasoning.{delta,done} event families, which use different
  index namespaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
